0: Backlit keyboard is something you'll never be able to live without once you've had it. Despite being larger than the HP, the power drain is MUCH lower. It's pretty heavy and unwieldy to carry it around like an ipad. The rebate process is very disappointed.
1: Construction is exceptional, although I wish the design employed removable USB and 3.5mm cables instead of the fixed ones. Sound quality isn’t that great with the built in speakers. The aesthetic of the case could have been put together better.
2: This bag has every pocket and storage compartment you could possibly need. The red highlights against the dark background are particularly nice. The hooks from the bag to the shoulder strap sometimes come apart. The port covers are so-so, but are definitely not flush.
3: This camera is definitely for beginners and I am an amateur at photography so this is perfect for me. Portrait shots are beautiful on this camera and I find they provide the best quality of them all. SOS alarm requires pressing for a couple of seconds to activate, SO much better than another where I have accidentally triggered it by a simple short press.
4: Cable came with extra batteries and charging station for pretty cheap. Charging station sometimes doesn't charge the gopro batteries entirely. Display may erroneously display a battery as fully charged when it isn't. Overall this is a decent set for the money.
5: The color is even better in person. I wish that it also had the numbers on the side, but I know they were going for smaller. Other than that I love it. Great price, works wonderfully.
